svg.title: JavaScript control statements overview
svg.desc: Three categories: Conditional (if, else, switch), Loops (for, while, do-while), and Jump (break, continue, return)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are control statements in JavaScript?')
sendPrompt('Explain if else and switch statements in JavaScript')
sendPrompt('Explain for while and do-while loops in JavaScript')
sendPrompt('Explain break continue and return in JavaScript')
sendPrompt('Explain if else statement with examples')
sendPrompt('What does break do in JavaScript?')
sendPrompt('What does continue do in JavaScript?')

svg.text: Click any box to ask me about it
